# PERF-151 positive: non-inlinable handler with loop + switch + closure
lang: go
file: PERF-151-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

func ComplexHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	switch r.Method {
	case "GET":
		for _, v := range r.URL.Query() {
			for _, s := range v {
				go func(s string) {
					w.Write([]byte(s))
				}(s)
			}
		}
	case "POST":
		var b strings.Builder
		for i := 0; i < 10; i++ {
			b.WriteString("item")
		}
		w.Write([]byte(b.String()))
	}
}
